text:
Home health services include the medical services of interns and residents-in-training 
under an approved hospital teaching program if the services are ordered by the physician 
or allowed practitioner who is responsible for the plan of care and the HHA is affiliated 
with or is under common control of a hospital furnishing the medical services. Approved 
means: 
 • Approved by the Accreditation Council for Graduate Medical Education; 

• In the case of an osteopathic hospital, approved by the
